message.content: How do I deploy this app using docker compose?

content.text: Create a docker-compose.yml with your app service. Then run: docker compose up -d. Docker will build and start your containers in detached mode.

message.content: Docker error: port 3000 already in use.

content.text: The docker error port 3000 already in use means another process holds that port. Find it with: lsof -i :3000. Kill the process or change the docker compose port mapping to 3001:3000. Problem solved.
